image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about natural killer cells.
Context visual: They're not your regular immune cells. These warriors patrol your body, ready to attack.
Escalation visual: Natural killer cells recognize and destroy infected or cancerous cells without prior exposure.
Evidence visual: Recent studies suggest they play a vital role in immunotherapy, helping us fight cancer more effectively.
Payoff visual: But, preliminary research shows we still have much to learn about how to enhance their power.
Cta visual: Curious about how your immune system works? Follow for more insights!
